steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states tribal economic activity contributed over 141,000 dollars per employee on average. The correct choice must place that figure accurately relative to the other sectors shown in the data.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — above all three of the other industries listed in the table.: would require tribal output to exceed transportation/warehousing — not supported because transportation/warehousing is higher. ✗
  • Choice B — below transportation/warehousing but above both manufacturing and health care.: places tribal output between those values, consistent with the over 141,000-dollar figure. ✓
  • Choice C — above either health care or manufacturing and nearly equal to transportation/warehousing.: It is above both health care and manufacturing, but it is not nearly equal to transportation/warehousing ($141,510 vs. $234,720). ✗
  • Choice D — below all three of the other industries listed in the table.: It is below transportation/warehousing but above manufacturing and health care, so it is not below all three. ✗
That matches Choice B — below transportation/warehousing but above both manufacturing and health care..
